body:
This PR should substitute the thermodynamic time step done in ClimaOcean. 

I need to think a bit more about the evolution of thickness and concentration and perform a couple of tests.
This PR tries to split lateral growth / melting (increase / decrease in concentration) from vertical growth / melting (increase / decrease in ice thickness). I am not very sure about this split, so everything is up for discussion in this PR.
title: Change the thermodynamic timestep

body: to capture the latest changes in the timestepping
title: (0.2.2) Bump version
